meta.title: lma4u — Let Me Ask AI For You
meta.description: Send anyone a link that shows them exactly how to ask your question on Grok AI. Free shareable AI prompt links with animated demo — no sign-up needed.

home.heading: Let Me Ask AI For You
home.subheading: Too lazy to explain how to use AI? Same. Paste their question, send them the link, and watch them figure it out themselves.
